name: Alto Lakes Golf & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Alto Lakes Golf & Country Club in Alto, NM! There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: White Mountain Recreation Complex
description: Come play pickleball at White Mountain Recreation Complex in Ruidoso, NM! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Zozo PB Courts
description: Zozo PB Courts is a place to play pickleball in Carrizozo, NM. The court surface is asphalt. You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
